baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI-resistant: when applying the annual GMI delta to this asset, halve it and round toward zero (e.g. +3 GMI applies as +1; -3 GMI applies as -1). Manufacturing absorbs shocks. Raw materials are always needed.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: If you also own a MANUFACTURING MIDSTREAM asset, this asset's value update roll can never produce a delta lower than 0. Guaranteed off-take from your own production facility eliminates raw material demand risk.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: If you also own an ENERGY UPSTREAM asset, this asset's loan capacity increases by 2. Co-located extraction operations share infrastructure and lender relationships.

flavourText: Gravel doesn't have a bull market. It also doesn't have a bear one.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI-resistant: when applying the annual GMI delta to this asset, halve it and round toward zero. Production facilities carry capacity risk when orders fall, but rarely collapse entirely.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: If you also own a MANUFACTURING UPSTREAM asset, this asset's loan capacity increases by 3. Owned raw material supply converts a fabrication plant from a cost centre into a vertically integrated lender asset.

If you also own a MANUFACTURING DOWNSTREAM asset, reduce taxable income from this asset by 1 each year. Owning your own distribution network allows production income to be reclassified as logistics throughput.

flavourText: The factory floor doesn't care about your feelings. It cares about throughput.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI-resistant: when applying the annual GMI delta to this asset, halve it and round toward zero. Distribution networks are the most GMI-stable asset in Manufacturing — goods move regardless of sentiment.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: If you also own a MANUFACTURING MIDSTREAM asset, add +1 to all positive delta outcomes on this asset's update roll. Owning the production source drives distribution volume and increases asset value.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: If you also own a REAL_ESTATE MIDSTREAM asset, reduce taxable income from this asset by 1 each year. Commercial property in your portfolio functions as a logistics hub — income is reclassified as property throughput revenue.

flavourText: Someone has to move the boxes. It might as well be profitable.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI-resistant: when applying the annual GMI delta to this asset, halve it and round toward zero. Large-scale mining operations carry execution risk in bad years, but the GMI buffer makes them one of the most stable Tier 2 growth assets.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: If you also own a MANUFACTURING MIDSTREAM asset, the GMI halving on this asset improves further: negative GMI deltas are reduced to 0 (no loss). Owning your own production facility converts raw material risk into a fully buffered supply chain.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: If you also own a REAL_ESTATE UPSTREAM asset, this asset's loan capacity increases by 3. Industrial land adjacent to raw material supply commands a significant lender premium.

flavourText: The mountain doesn't care about your spreadsheet. Dig anyway.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI-resistant: when applying the annual GMI delta to this asset, halve it and round toward zero. Heavy industry is the backbone of the real economy — it slows before it breaks, and recovers before markets notice.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: If you also own a MANUFACTURING UPSTREAM asset, this asset's loan capacity increases by 3. Vertical supply chain control reassures lenders — no commodity price risk, no margin squeeze.

If you also own a MANUFACTURING DOWNSTREAM asset, once per depression event you may ignore one negative GMI delta on any asset you own — treat that delta as 0 for this year only. Full vertical stack converts Manufacturing into a true economic shock absorber.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: If you also own an ENERGY MIDSTREAM asset, reduce taxable income from this asset by 1 each year. Industrial energy contracts allow production costs to be classified as operating expenses against revenue.

flavourText: We make the things that make everything else. You're welcome.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI-resistant: when applying the annual GMI delta to this asset, halve it and round toward zero. Logistics networks are correlated to trade volume, not sentiment — they compress slowly and recover fast.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: If you also own a MANUFACTURING MIDSTREAM asset, add +1 to all positive delta outcomes on this asset's update roll. Owning production and distribution creates compounding volume — both assets appreciate faster together.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: If you also own a REAL_ESTATE MIDSTREAM asset, reduce taxable income from this asset by 1 each year. Commercial property and logistics form a natural hub — warehouse revenue offsets distribution income for tax purposes.

flavourText: The supply chain is the strategy. Everything else is commentary.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI-resistant: when applying the annual GMI delta to this asset, halve it and round toward zero. At conglomerate scale, Manufacturing becomes a macro stabiliser — even in a depression, this asset loses far less than any other Tier 3 card.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: If you also own a MANUFACTURING UPSTREAM asset, once per depression event you may ignore one negative GMI delta on any single asset you own — treat that delta as 0 for this year only. Vertical raw material control makes the conglomerate recession-proof on command.

If you also own a MANUFACTURING DOWNSTREAM asset, this asset's loan capacity increases by 4. Full supply chain ownership — from extraction to delivery — is the most bankable configuration in the Manufacturing sector.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: If you also own a FINANCE MIDSTREAM asset, this asset's loan repayment roll triggers only on a 1 (instead of 1–2). Industrial conglomerates with institutional banking relationships are treated as investment-grade borrowers.

flavourText: Forty thousand employees. Twelve product lines. One balance sheet. Nobody leaves.
